WHAT IS CRYPTO N’ KAFE WORLD?

Crypto N’ Kafe is the decentralized consumer ecosystem powered by blockchain

HOW IT WORKS

  • Directly connects coffee farmers and consumers
  • Overcomes retailer domination
  • Offers a variety of smart contracts to facilitate operations.
  • Uses the Crypto N’ Kafe token as means of consumer loyalty program rewards

BENEFITS TO CONSUMERS

  • How to buy bitcoin in India
  • High-quality coffee cheaper than in stores
  • Coffee bought online easily and conveniently
  • Unlimited access to suppliers of choice

Benefits to Farmers

  • Full control of product pricing and listing
  • Marketing and promotion directly to consumers
  • Fast and detailed customer feedback

The Value Of CNK Chain

FARMERS
  • Acquire best knowledge of coffee trading
  • Gain higher income
  • Skip the middlemen
  • Financial freedom
TRADERS
  • Access more convenient payment methods
  • Export to the entire world at lower cost and faster shipment
  • Free from complicated banking procedures
ROASTERS
  • Make a deal directly with farmers and traders
  • Entice to simple payment process at low fee
  • Trade on one-stop business to business commerce website
RETAILERS
  • Make use of advanced tools for retailing systems
  • Offer an easy access to end-customers with mobile wallet, debit card and P2P exchange
  • Trade on one-stop B2B commerce website

WHY CNK ?

  • FAIR TRADE

    No hidden margin/markup per coffee transaction

  • CASHLESS MEDIUM

    Use it without any central authority such as government, company, or bank

  • HEALTHY ECOSYSTEM

    Enable smooth flow within the African coffee supply chain

  • FINANCIAL SUPPORT

    Offer low price volatility from both ends

  • HIGHER INCOME

    Improve the farmer's average income with full control of their finance

  • LOW INFLATION

    A steadily decreasing inflation rate provides favorable economic conditions.

CNK IS OPTIMAL CASH

The smart middleman that promotes fair, secure and profitable coffee trade
CNK mobile app is available on both iOS and Android for seamless transactions. It features advanced blockchain, high-speed access, low cost, and secure trading.
    DOWNLOAD ON THE APP STORE
    GET IT ON Google Play
Crypto-out Card
Just like other credit cards,CNK debit cards are loaded with funds from linked web/mobile wallets and can be used wherever a credit card is accepted. CNK debit cards allows users to buy CNK tokens or pull them from their web/mobile wallets directly, hence saving customers the need to keep their web/mobile wallets separate from the card’s wallet.

DOCUMENTS

  •

FAQ

1. How many CNK tokens are distributed through the ICO?
The maximum total token supply is 78,600,000. No token creation, minting or mining after the end of the ICO period.
Tokens sold on pre-ICO and ICO will account for 65% of the total token supply. The remaining 35% will be allocated as follows:
- 15% Team (locked for 1 years)
- 10% Advisors, Whitelist, and Bounty (locked for 3 months, except bounty)
- 10% Investors (will start in 2019)
2. What happens if scheduled tokens are not all distributed until the ICO is over?
If it does not meet the full maximum amount, CNK will be issued only for the existing investors. Therefore, the total number of issued CNK may vary depending on the ICO result
3. What is the expected value of CNK tokens after the ICO?
The value cannot be predicted in advance. As with any other cryptocurrencies, the value of token is determined by the market valuation. We expect it to grow at: 1 CNK = 0.00249 ETH
4. Can anyone participate in the ICO?
Although we welcome all investors to back our ICO, it is crucial that only registered investors with basic information will be prioritized to buy CNK tokens.
5. When will I receive my purchased CNK tokens?
All tokens will be released to the purchasers one week after the end of ICO.
6. How can I withdraw my purchased CNK tokens?
-First, you need to fill in the KYC form (*) and create your own CNK wallet which will be available upon the end of ICO. We will make an announcement on the CNK Token Distribution across our media channels.
-Second, you will provide us your CNK Wallet address to officially receive your purchased CNK Tokens.
*Note: Those who failed to submit their KYCs will not be able to receive their purchased CNK Tokens
